backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Icon, Connection, FreehandDrawing, Line, TextLabel, Image, DiagramState) and CRUD operations for named diagrams and user profiles, with authorization checks via AccessControl and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: fixing save-diagram persistence so saved diagrams appear in DiagramSidebar/LoadDiagramDialog without page reload, and restricting drag-and-drop in AttackPathToolbar to only the icon image element.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Threat Hunting Portal' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/index.ts: Standalone snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage to capture a canvas element and export it as a PNG data URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for report list, create, detail, and attack-path pages, guards them behind Internet Identity authentication, and conditionally shows a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive SVG canvas component for the attack-path diagram supporting drag-and-drop placement, freehand drawing, line/arrow tools, text labels, image elements, resize/rotate handles, eraser, and connection rendering via AttackPathConnector.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG component rendering a directed arrow connector between two points with optional rotation, selection highlighting, and a wider invisible hit area for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Defines an `AttackPathIcon` React component that renders a named icon image (from a predefined map of 30+ attack-path icon types) with an optional label, supporting drag from toolbar.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Renders the attack-path diagram toolbar with draggable icon definitions, drawing tool buttons (select, connect, pen, line, etc.), and actions for undo/redo, save/load, clear, and image upload.
frontend/src/components/DiagramSidebar.t: Displays a sidebar listing all saved diagrams fetched via `useGetAllDiagrams`, allowing users to load or delete diagrams with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the top-level page layout with a sticky header/nav (Reports, Attack Path, New Report links, login state), an optional hero banner on the home page, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: A modal dialog that lists saved diagrams (via `useGetAllDiagrams`) and lets the user load one onto the canvas or delete it.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when the user is authenticated via Internet Identity, clearing the identity and React Query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen that prompts unauthenticated users to authenticate via Internet Identity, showing a loading state during the login process.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component that provides a searchable popover for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, plus an input for adding custom techniques, displaying all selections as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a given report using the `generateReportPdf` utility, showing a loading spinner and toast notifications for success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that forces new users to enter their name to complete profile setup, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook and blocking dismissal until saved.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports, managing fields like title, author, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, and remediation details before submitting.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts the user to enter a name for saving an attack path diagram, calling the provided `onSave` callback with the trimmed name.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: A static data file exporting a typed array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques, each with an ID, name, and description, covering categories like Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A React hook that manages the full local state of an attack path diagram—including icons, connections, freehand drawings, lines, text labels, and images—with undo/redo history support.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, returning a list of NamedDiagram objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, with loading state tied to actor availability.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single diagram by its bigint ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines stubbed React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (get, save, delete) that return empty data or throw errors since the backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a named diagram state to the backend and invalidates related diagram query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Page component for the attack path diagram editor, composing the canvas, toolbar, sidebar, and save/load dialogs with full diagram state management.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component that renders a form for creating a new threat hunt report and submits it via the useSaveReport mutation, navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays the full details of a single threat hunt report fetched by ID, including sections for summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, and a PDF download button.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React page component that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with options to view, download as PDF, and delete each report, using TanStack Router for navigation and React Query hooks for data fetching.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file intended for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates a styled printable HTML document for a threat hunting report and opens it in a new browser window for PDF export via the browser's print dialog.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), border radii, fonts, shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite build configuration for a React app targeting an Internet Computer (ICP) backend, with path aliasing, environment variable injection for canister IDs, and a dev-server proxy for local ICP replica API calls.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking two pending bug fixes: persisting saved diagrams to the backend so they appear in the sidebar/load dialog, and restricting drag-and-drop in AttackPathToolbar to icon images only rather than the entire button including its label.
